value.found_quote:
### Enable Remote Control for all sessions
By default, Remote Control only activates when you explicitly run `claude remote-control`, `claude --remote-control`, or `/remote-control`. To enable it automatically for every interactive session, run `/config` inside Claude Code and set **Enable Remote Control for all sessions** to `true`.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a setting called "Enable Remote Control for all sessions" that can be set to true via /config. Remote Control itself is described as being in research preview, so the lifecycle status is preview.
